required.name: redis
required.type: Redis (optional, FR-06 cache; graceful no-Redis fallback per SPEC.md L88-L89, L229)
required.checked_via: redis-cli PING via nc localhost:6379 -> no response (FR-06 NOT degraded; cache falls back to no-op)
required.fix: Start Redis if you want to exercise FR-06 cache path: docker run -d --name redis -p 6379:6379 redis:7-alpine  OR  brew install redis && brew services start redis

summary: Phase 8 environment is READY. All hard requirements are present: (1) venv Python 3.11.15 with fastapi 0.136.3, httpx 0.28.1, uvicorn 0.48.0, pydantic 2.13.4, click 8.4.1, pytest 8.4.2, pytest-asyncio 1.4.0, pytest-cov 7.1.0; (2) CLI tools python3, pip3, ffmpeg (8.1.1), docker, git, gh, jq, curl all on PATH; (3) Kokoro backend HTTP service reachable at http://localhost:8880/v1/audio/voices (200 OK). All 14 app env vars from src/infrastructure/config.py and 5 harness env vars are unset but every one has a safe code default (env vars are optional by design — config.py uses os.environ.get(..., default) for all 14, including REDIS_URL which is intentionally None and triggers the no-Redis fallback path). No env var is strictly required to start the proxy. NOT blocking: redis-server is not installed and Redis is not running — this is acceptable because FR-06 specifies a graceful no-Redis fallback (SPEC.md L88-L89, L229); set REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 and start a Redis instance only if you want to exercise the cache-hit path. To install redis-server if desired: brew install redis && brew services start redis. The hiredis pip package is also missing but is not in requirements.txt and is not required by any FR. No docker-compose.yml exists in this project — the Kokoro backend is an external dependency not managed by this repo (per PROJECT_BRIEF.md §1 and SPEC.md L122-L124). All 82 tests previously passed (Gate 1..4 all PASS per CLAUDE.md).
